About David

DRIVEN BY PASSION,
INSPIRED BY ACTION

Two-time All-American at the University of Georgia. First-round NFL Draft pick. ESPN college football analyst for 12 years. College Football Hall of Famer. These accolades only scratch the surface of who David Pollack is.

After a career-ending neck injury, David didn't retreat — he redirected. Today he channels that same competitive fire into inspiring audiences across corporate events, faith-based gatherings, and everything in between. His message is simple: every day counts.

Meet David
Topics for Every Event

POPULAR SPEAKING TOPICS

Every presentation is tailored to your audience, but these themes resonate across industries and stages.

01

Every Day Counts

David shares the mindset and daily disciplines that drove him from walk-on hopeful to All-American — and how your team can adopt the same relentless approach.

02

Faith, Family, Football

A talk about priorities, purpose, and what happens when life forces you to redefine success on and off the field.

03

Overcoming Adversity & Leadership

From a career-ending injury to a national media career, David shares the framework for turning setbacks into comebacks.

04

Encouraged by Faith

A faith-based keynote on finding hope, strength, and purpose through life's hardest seasons.

05

Winning Mindset

The mental frameworks that separate good from great — lessons from the field, the studio, and the toughest moments in between.

06

Custom Topic

David works directly with event organizers to craft a message tailored to your audience, your mission, and your moment.

Inquire About Booking
New Book

EVERY DAY COUNTS

David's new book is a powerful call to live with intention, purpose, and relentless gratitude for every opportunity. Every chapter is a challenge to stop coasting and start competing — for the life you were made to live.

Learn More
Children's Book

THE WON'T QUIT KID

A Brave Books story about confidence, effort, and never giving up — no matter how tough things get.

Get the Book →
